title: FIRE RESTRICTIONS AND CLOSURES - 211info
text: OREGON DEPARTMENT OF FORESTRY FIRE RESTRICTIONS AND CLOSURES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about public and industrial fire restrictions by county, burn bans, and resources for fire prevention. 2600 State Street Salem, OR 97310 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: Afrikaans, Amharic, Arabic, Chinese (Simplied), Chinese (Traditional), English, French, Hindi, Hmong/Lus Hmoob, Japanese, Korean, Nepali, Russian, Somali, Spanish, Swahili, Thai, Ukranian, and Vietnamese AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Burning Bans Fire Prevention Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON DEPARTMENT OF FORESTRY
